summary: Completed iteration 13 testing for provisioning stepper architectural split. The provisioning stepper has been moved from AnimaVM page to the genesis/onboarding screen. For deployed agents (config_exists=true), app goes directly to dashboard. AnimaVM is now monitoring-only with status bar and 7 tabs. All 17 backend and code review tests passed (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: App.js genesis view contains 6-step provisioning stepper (data-testid='provision-stepper') - CORRECT
AnimaVM.js has NO provisioning stepper - CORRECT (monitoring-only)
AnimaVM.js has status bar with 5 pills: Sandbox, Terminal, OpenClaw, Claude Code, Engine
AnimaVM.js has 7 monitor tabs: Live Feed, Terminal, Exec Log, Agent Logs, Browsing, VMs, Message
Sidebar.js has 'animavm' as first navigation item
Genesis screen has wallet QR section (data-testid='wallet-qr') that shows when wallet_address exists
For deployed agent (anima-fund), config_exists=true so app skips genesis and shows dashboard directly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard loads, AnimaVM page verified, agent dropdown works)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified the architectural split: provisioning stepper moved from AnimaVM to genesis screen. For already-deployed agents, genesis screen is skipped (config_exists=true), app goes to dashboard. AnimaVM is now monitoring-only. All 17 tests pass. Genesis screen was NOT browser-tested because deployed agent goes directly to dashboard - code review confirmed implementation is correct.
backend_apis_tested: GET /api/agents - 200 OK (2 agents: Anima Fund, TestSkills)
